Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class DpeRuntimeData

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.DpeRuntimeData
public class DpeRuntimeData extends Object
The runtime data of a running DPE.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<ContainerRuntimeData>
    containers()
    Gets the runtime report of all the containers running on the DPE.
    double
    cpuUsage()
    Gets the reported CPU usage of the DPE.
    long
    memoryUsage()
    Gets the amount of memory in use by the DPE.
    DpeName
    name()
     
    LocalDateTime
    snapshotTime()
    Gets the local time when the runtime data was collected.
    double
    systemLoad()
    Gets the system load average of the node where the DPE is running.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • name

      public DpeName name()

    • snapshotTime

      public LocalDateTime snapshotTime()
      Gets the local time when the runtime data was collected.
      Returns:
      the snapshot time of the report

    • cpuUsage

      public double cpuUsage()
      Gets the reported CPU usage of the DPE.

      A value of 1.0 is equivalent to 100% CPU usage.

      Returns:
      the CPU usage or NaN if it could not be obtained

    • memoryUsage

      public long memoryUsage()
      Gets the amount of memory in use by the DPE.
      Returns:
      the amount of memory that the DPE is using, measured in bytes

    • systemLoad

      public double systemLoad()
      Gets the system load average of the node where the DPE is running.
      Returns:
      the system load average, or a negative value if not available

    • containers

      public Set<ContainerRuntimeData> containers()
      Gets the runtime report of all the containers running on the DPE.
      Returns:
      the runtime data of the containers
